ODDMELT-CORRODED_NEEDLE.title: Corroded Needle
ODDMELT-CORRODED_NEEDLE.flavor: It wasn't a gift, but it is cherished nonetheless.
ODDMELT-CORRODED_NEEDLE.description: Attacks deal [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] additional damage to debuffed enemies.
ODDMELT-IMPURE_COIL.title: Impure Coil
ODDMELT-IMPURE_COIL.flavor: The vile substance, now in harmony with its container.
ODDMELT-IMPURE_COIL.description: Attacks deal [blue]{ExtraDamage}[/blue] additional damage for each debuff enemies have.
